narrative:
Seven Hills-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,117 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.5 percentage points.
